content.en:
"Sure enough, these blue crystals have a bigger effect on me!"

After Ye Tian refined a blue crystal, he was pleasantly surprised.

He had already refined a lot of blue crystals before, but at that time, his cultivation was at the peak of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor, and it was useless to continue refining.

But now, he had just broken through to a half-step ninefold ancestor, and he could refine the blue crystal, and he had a higher degree of absorption of the energy contained in the blue crystal, so the effect was even better.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian's cultivation to be completely stabilized, and it was still steadily increasing.

At this rate, it wouldn't be long before he could raise his cultivation to the extreme of a half-step Ninefold Ancestor.

And after stabilizing the realm, Ye Tian tested his immeasurable will.

"16.5 scale!"

The immeasurable will has been increased from 15.8 scales to 16.5 scales, which is a small increase, but the immeasurable will is the exclusive domain of the Ninefold Ancestor.

Therefore, from the peak realm of the eightfold original ancestor to the half-step ninefold ancestral realm, the immeasurable will will naturally not transform, and it is already very good to be able to improve.

What really made Ye Tian happy was that his cultivation had broken through to the half-step Ninefold Ancestor realm, and he could continue to use black liquor to refine the immeasurable will and increase the strength of the immeasurable will.

In the following days, Ye Tian began to use black liquor to enhance his immeasurable will, and use blue crystals to improve his cultivation.

And in the truncated copy body of the Xuanlou, he has been using the Infinite Dao Domain and the Nine Extremes Fusion Technique to fuse his Ninefold Life Dao Flower and Ninefold Yuan Dao Flower.

After all, only by completely fusing the Ninefold Life Dao Flower and the Ninefold Yuan Dao Flower into ten percent can one be qualified to attack the Ninefold Ancestor.

Gradually, hundreds of billions of years of the Primordial Era passed.

this day.

Ye Tian tested his immeasurable will, he had already reached 19 scales, and he could continue to improve, at this rate, his immeasurable will scale in the half-step ninefold ancestor realm could definitely reach 20 scales.

The immeasurable will of 20 scales, this is already extremely terrifying, far beyond the ordinary Ninefold Ancestor!

In addition, Ye Tian's cultivation had also improved significantly, gradually approaching the limit of the half-step Ninefold Ancestor.

And Ye Tian's Ninefold Life Dao Flower and Ninefold Yuan Dao Flower were also completely fused into ten percent and turned into a Dao flower.

It can be said that Ye Tian can attack the Ninefold Origin Ancestor realm at any time.

However, he won't impact for the time being, after all, he can continue to improve at the half-step Ninefold Origin Ancestor level, and then attack the Ninefold Origin Ancestor after he can't improve.

In this way, when he stepped into the realm of the Nine Ancestral Ancestors, his strength would be greatly improved.

......

Cut off the exclusion zone.

On this day, a big thing happened here.

Jellyfish went crazy!!!

As the strongest substance-level powerhouse second only to the soul elder, the jellyfish is a taboo existence in the forbidden area, she has no clansmen, strictly speaking, there were clansmen, but they were all killed when she went crazy.

Jellyfish's temperament is tyrannical, and her cultivation is flawed, coupled with the fact that she has cut off the seal of the forbidden area, which causes her to be tyrannical and crazy from time to time.

The point is that there is no pattern at all!

Rumble!!!!

At this time, the breath of the jellyfish seemed to run through the entire forbidden area, and every area was ravaged by her breath, and many areas were shattered by her violent breath.

"Jellyfish are crazy again!"

"Soul Elder, only Soul Elder can stop her!"

"Yes, we must invite the soul to come, we can't stop it, otherwise we will be hit hard by the jellyfish if we are not careful!"

At this moment, the soul elder appeared and came to the jellyfish.

"Jellyfish, you better go and cut off the source sea for a while to calm down!"

Soul Elder said.

If it was before, when the seal had not been broken, the jellyfish would be sealed in the truncated source sea most of the time, so no matter how crazy you were in the truncation source sea, it would not affect the truncation of the forbidden area.

But now, the effect of jellyfish going crazy in the cut off forbidden area is too great.

Moreover, if he didn't stop the jellyfish, with the strength of the jellyfish, even if he entered the Interception Source Sea, he would easily come out.

Therefore, he will forcibly pull the jellyfish into the cut-off zone, but personally suppress her and force her to stay in the cut-off zone.

Thundered!!!!

The soul elder fought with the jellyfish a few times, calming the jellyfish for a moment, but pulled the jellyfish into the truncated source sea.

And as soon as they enter the Truncated Source Sea, the jellyfish begins to go crazy again, and they will forcibly rush out of the Truncated Source Sea.

For this reason, the soul elder can only attack the jellyfish so that it has no way to leave.

Although their battle was terrifying, the sealing power that cut off the Source Sea was too terrifying, so their destructive power here was not too exaggerated.

......

"Two supreme enhancement levels are fighting!"

Ye Tian was a little shocked.

And the other party is constantly fighting here, and it doesn't matter if it affects him, but if he senses his own existence, it won't be good.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian annihilated his copy body for the first time, so that the other party would not be aware of his existence.

"It's safer this way, otherwise once you find yourself, you won't be able to continue to dive into the Truncated Source Sea in the future!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In the blink of an eye, another period of time has passed.

Ye Tian copied a Death Dark Ape and asked the Death Dark Ape creature to sneak into the Truncated Source Sea to see the situation, but as soon as he entered the Truncated Source Sea, he sensed the violent breath of the jellyfish, although the other party was not fighting anymore, but the situation was still not good.

Seeing this, Ye Tian completely gave up his recent cultivation of the Truncated Source Sea.

Anyway, he was not far from the limit of the half-step Ninefold Origin Ancestor, even if he didn't cut off the source sea to cultivate, he would just spend some more years cultivating.

Moreover, there are also many treasures in the Nine-Story Building, and with the help of the Nine-Story Building's treasure land to cultivate, the speed of strength improvement will not be much slower.

Time flies, and trillions of primordial era years have passed in the blink of an eye.

"The immeasurable will scale is 20.03, and the cultivation has reached the limit of the half-step Ninefold Ancestor, and there is no way for the physical body to continue to improve, and the Ninefold Life Dao Flower and the Ninefold Yuan Dao Flower have also fused ten percent. Now, I can't continue to improve, I have to break the shackles and achieve the Ninefold Origin Ancestor Realm!"

Ye Tian knew very well that with his own foundation and potential, it was very easy to become a Ninefold Ancestor, and the success rate was almost 100%.

Immediately, Ye Tian applied to attack the Ninefold Ancestor, preparing to practice in a treasure land of the Ninefold Ancestor, and with the protection of the Ninefold Building, he would not interfere with his breakthrough with the Dao Ancestor.

The Nine-Story Building quickly passed Ye Tian's application, allowing Ye Tian to enter the Supreme Golden Mountain of the Nine-Story Building to break through, which was the most suitable treasure place for the Nine-Story Building to break through.
